description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes repository code on push to specific branches, on pull requests to a specific branch, and on a weekly schedule. Run an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions, contents, and write permission for security events. Use a matrix strategy to analyze multiple languages including C++, Java, Python, and Ruby. Check out the repository, initialize CodeQL tools, attempt to autobuild compiled languages, and perform CodeQL analysis.
